filter_by_rule_health.note: Same shape/styling as /alerts 'Filter by rule group state' filter — but different filter semantics (health vs group state)

search_input.placeholder: Filter by rule name or labels

empty_state.title: No rules found
empty_state.note: Identical copy to /alerts empty state, though /alerts shows alerting rules and /rules shows recording rules. Title and body are duplicate strings.

inconsistency_note_vs_alerts: Both /alerts and /rules show identical empty-state text 'No rules found' — but they serve different rule types. /alerts should distinguish alerting rules; /rules should distinguish recording rules. Also duplicative title+body with same string.
